rtl_guidelines.tailwind_classes: Use logical properties: ms-* (margin-inline-start), me-*, ps-*, pe-*, text-start, text-end, border-s-*, rounded-s-*

scale.h1: text-5xl md:text-6xl lg:text-7xl tracking-tighter leading-[1.1] font-black

motion_and_interaction.scrolling: Lenis for smooth momentum scrolling. Mandatory for premium feel.
motion_and_interaction.hero_reveal: Masked line-by-line reveal using Framer Motion (initial Y offset, opacity 0 to 1, staggerChildren).
motion_and_interaction.parallax: Subtle parallax on hero images and abstract shapes using Framer Motion useScroll and useTransform.
motion_and_interaction.hover_states: Images scale up slightly (scale-105) inside a hidden overflow container. Buttons use pill shape with subtle shadow.
motion_and_interaction.marquee: Slow editorial marquee for clinic philosophy or services using react-fast-marquee.

components.buttons: Pill-shaped (rounded-full). Solid Brass or Primary Green background. Minimal padding py-3 px-8. Hover: subtle shadow and color darkening. Do not use generic square buttons.
components.cards: Minimalist borders (1px solid border color). No heavy shadows. Flat rectangular surfaces.
components.forms: Shadcn UI customized. Minimalist floating labels or clean underlined inputs. Very stark, medical precision.
components.icons: Use custom SVGs or `iconoir-react` (premium thin line style). Tinted in Accent Brass or Primary Green.

sections_layout.header: Sticky glassmorphism header (backdrop-blur-xl bg-[#F7F8F6]/70 dark:bg-[#25272C]/70). Must have theme toggle and RTL nav layout.
sections_layout.hero: Asymmetric split. Right (RTL start): Massive typography (line masked). Left (RTL end): Editorial clipped frame image of a facial profile.
sections_layout.services_grid: Bento box layout. Mixed spans (col-span-1, col-span-2) using large negative space. No generic equal-size grids.
sections_layout.manifesto: Numbered chapters using large typography (e.g., '۰۱'). Editorial scrolling layout.
sections_layout.before_after: Elegant side-by-side clipped frames with hover reveals.
sections_layout.doctor_profile: High-contrast editorial layout. Large typography intersecting with the doctor's portrait.
sections_layout.appointment: Multi-step registration form using Shadcn. Cardless, sharp borders, carefully validated.
sections_layout.footer: Massive bottom padding. Very large typography for the brand name. Minimalist links.

hero_abstract.description: Green abstract organic shape for parallax background elements

hero_patient.description: Elegant woman profile in black and white, excellent for Awwwards-level clinical elegance

clinic_interior.description: Luxury medical clinic interior for 'About Clinic' section

instructions_to_main_agent: CRITICAL: Set dir='rtl' on the root HTML or main wrapper element.
CRITICAL: Use Tailwind logical properties exclusively for margins/paddings (ps-, pe-, ms-, me-, text-start, text-end) to ensure RTL layout functions perfectly.
Install and setup 'lenis' for smooth scrolling.
Install 'framer-motion' for all kinetic reveals (hero mask text, staggered fades, scroll animations).
Implement Shadcn UI for the Appointment Form, ensuring RTL direction is passed into components (Radix primitives usually support a `dir='rtl'` prop on their Root components).
Ensure both Light and Dark modes are fully supported and toggleable.
Avoid standard Bootstrap/Tailwind blocky grids. Use the 'Bento' or 'Tetris' grid styles.
UNIVERSAL_GUIDELINES_FOR_MAIN_AGENT: Do not use generic centralized layouts. Avoid default Shadcn card looks; go for 'cardless' or ultra-minimal 1px borders. Create depth through layered design elements with z-index hierarchy. All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a data-testid attribute.
